## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `mitnick check ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if applicable.

## Environment

- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (package being analyzed, CLI flags used, etc.)
